title: Noah Lucas homepage compact controls and impact overlays
changeSummary: Makes carousel tabs small and discreet.
Moves employer logo icons above Product Thesis.
Removes gradient treatment from section and work-card surfaces.
Uses clean one-pixel liquid-glass borders on updated surfaces.
Constrains the Serve Robotics GIF to a smaller one-to-one presentation on white media background.
Replaces hover impact tooltips with explicit Impact buttons that open media overlays.

checks: page_identity: pass - Noah Lucas — Product Executive
console_health: pass - No relevant warn/error logs captured during desktop/mobile pass.
employer_icons_above_product_thesis: pass - #experience top is above #summary top.
carousel_tabs_discreet: pass - Carousel dot button computed 12px by 12px.
no_work_card_case_study_ctas: pass - 0 Case Study labels inside .work-card-actions.
gradients_removed_from_updated_surfaces: pass - Computed background-image is none for summary section and first work card.
one_pixel_clean_borders: pass - Feed and first work card computed top/right border widths are 1px.
serve_gif_contained: pass - Serve active GIF computed object-fit contain, 360x326.8 inside 861.3x430 white media field.
impact_overlay_desktop: pass - Serve Impact click opens overlay, aria-hidden=false, aria-expanded=true.
impact_overlay_mobile: pass - Serve Impact click opens overlay on 390x844 viewport.
no_local_path_leaks: pass - Publish and preview artifacts contain no file:// or /Users/noah references.
production_untouched: pass - Only staging/latest.json was updated; site/latest.json remains on the previous production pointer.

supersedesReason: v006 public QA showed work-card surfaces still inheriting a higher-specificity gradient and side-border override.
